title: zbCraft
description: A small mod that adds items and blocks about zb.
body:
### English:

zb is a famout Minecraft video blogger in China and this is the mod that adds items and blocks about zb. Enjoy the new blocks and items!

Block of zb will be generated in the Overworld and The End. You can use it to make Item of zb as an tool that have a high damage.

Block of zb will glow and it is hard to break. It is valuable and difficult to find.

Item of zb is a useful tool that can break many kinds of block.

There are also paintings of zb.

There will be more content in zbmod in diffdrent ways.

The mod is made by MCreator.

### Chinese:

欢迎来到zbCraft模组，该模组目前仍处于早期开发阶段，添加了关于zb的更多游戏内容。

目前已有的内容包括：zb块，zb物品，zb画等

该模组由MCreator制作。
